title: Newegg Commerce H2 2025 Earnings Report - Summary and Financial Analysis
text:
Newegg Commerce H2 2025 Earnings Report Summary and Financial Analysis.

Earnings Release Date: April 28, 2026 - Full year 2025 results announced.

Revenue Performance: Net sales of $1.44 billion, up 16.9% from $1.24B in FY2024. This represents stabilization and recovery after declines in prior years.

Profitability Metrics: Net loss narrowed to $4.9 million from $43.3 million loss in FY2024. Adjusted EBITDA swung to positive $24.8 million from negative $9.5M in prior year. Gross profit grew 28% to $168.5 million from $131.5 million.

GMV Performance: Gross Merchandise Value reached $1.77 billion, up 15.4% from $1.53 billion. This metric includes both direct sales and marketplace revenue.

Operational Efficiency: The company demonstrated operating leverage with SG&A expense discipline. Cost management initiatives including real estate consolidation contributed to profitability improvement.

Customer Metrics: Active customers grew to 1.13 million. Repeat purchase rate improved to 25.2% from 23.0%. Average order value increased to $467 from $401.

2026 Guidance: Management projects return to profitability with net income of $6.1M-$15.7M. Revenue guidance of $1.23B-$1.47B. Gross profit guidance of $144M-$171M.

Key Takeaway: Newegg has achieved a meaningful operational turnaround with clear visibility to sustained profitability, supported by GPU market tailwinds and improved operational execution.
